doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.
coverage_notes: source authority, contracts, data schema, approved api boundary, runtime service, validation, evidence, gate, dependency order, runtime validation, and screen contract applicability are represented in structured ticket fields.
future_refresh_policy: Future draft requires repo refresh, staleness scan, dependency refresh, ticket-pack re-audit, scale_decomposition_audit, predictive stop analysis, autonomous readiness, and explicit human approval before execution.
execution_lock: execution_locked before execution until refresh and re-audit are complete

health smoke verification when runtime service or api boundary is touched

stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
